sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114637" key="xrhmatourgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρημᾰτουργία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Astrol., <sense id="n114637.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">operation, activity,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν ἀστέρων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> </cit> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).214</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
